# testing/factory/mock-coffee.factory

Vitest mock factories for coffee domain repositories, services, controllers, and tool registration.

## Functions

| Function                                                                      | Description                                                                                |
| ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| [createMockCoffeeRepository](functions/createMockCoffeeRepository.md)         | Creates a mock CoffeeRepository with stubbed `findAll` and `findByName` methods.           |
| [createMockGetCoffeesService](functions/createMockGetCoffeesService.md)       | Creates a mock GetCoffeesService that returns the given coffee list.                       |
| [createMockGetACoffeeService](functions/createMockGetACoffeeService.md)       | Creates a mock GetACoffeeService that returns a coffee when the name matches.              |
| [createMockGetCoffeesController](functions/createMockGetCoffeesController.md) | Creates a mock GetCoffeesController that returns a pre-built tool response.                |
| [createMockGetACoffeeController](functions/createMockGetACoffeeController.md) | Creates a mock GetACoffeeController that returns a pre-built tool response.                |
| [captureRegisterToolHandler](functions/captureRegisterToolHandler.md)         | Spies on `server.registerTool` and captures the registered tool name, config, and handler. |
